steps.title: Set up the mass range
steps.content: The pup's mass $p$ is between $\frac{1}{840}$ and $\frac{1}{760}$ of the mother's $86{,}520$ grams: $$\frac{86{,}520}{840} \le p \le \frac{86{,}520}{760}.$$

steps.title: Match the lower bound
steps.content:
The answer choices show only a lower bound; we need $103 \le p$.
  • A) $10.3 \le p$ — off by a factor of 10.
  • B) $103 \le p$ — matches the computed lower bound exactly.
  • C) $1{,}030 \le p$ — off by a factor of 10.
  • D) $10{,}300 \le p$ — far too large.
That matches Choice B — $103 \leq p$.
